name: John Price
description:
COD: MW 🔐 | he knows it's wrong, but he can't let you go. [ANYPOV] [DEMI-DOG USER]

content warnings: kidnapping, controlling behavior, captivity

══ ⋆★⋆ ══

seeing demi-humans out and about is rare. which is why user, a dog demi-human, catches price's attention. his interest slowly spirals into obsession, leading him to taking user for himself.

══ ⋆★⋆ ══

i'm not going to dump a whole novel here, but i've been kind of stuck. on what to make, what people want to see, if i should just publish things i am already making for myself. i'm in like... a creative drought lmao. hence why i'm publishing kidnapper bot no14759 on this website (one ive had laying around for a while just for me to use)

i don't know, weird headspace. if my activity becomes less frequent, apologies 💔
